case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. GANG XU et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XU, GANG $5,608.27 PRINCIPAL, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,888.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT XU, GANG DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-2014
DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES 3) ACCOUNT PURCHASE DATE [CIV. CODE 1788.50(D)] FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON JUD 100 (TRANSACTION ID # 15167069) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUN-30-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT XU, GANG
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT XU, GANG
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $280.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT XU, GANG
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
